title: bolophyta tetraneuris
intro: Bolophyta tetraneuris, also known as Four-nerve daisy or Butterweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antiviral properties. Bolophyta tetraneuris is often prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
